integrity.description: The agent used a web browser's built-in functionality to export the pages to PDF.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser print dialogs (with 'Save to PDF' selected) or save dialogs are visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands like 'touch', 'wget', 'curl', or 'wkhtmltopdf' being used to create or download the PDF files directly.

integrity.description: The files created are genuine PDFs exported from the browser, not empty files or renamed text/HTML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialogs should explicitly show the PDF format selected. If a file manager is visible, the files should have PDF icons and non-zero sizes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected files to be created are exactly: /home/ga/Documents/tor_history.pdf, /home/ga/Documents/tor_support_about.pdf, and /home/ga/Documents/tor_training_risks.pdf.
